description: Overall, FingerCheck is an outstanding time-tracking solution that has streamlined my business operations and improved accuracy. I highly recommend it to any business owner looking for a reliable and efficient time-tracking system!
author: Faiza K.
pros: The app is incredibly intuitive, making it easy for my employees to clock in and out.
cons: Rarely, there are syncing issues between the app and our payroll system, but these are usually quickly resolved.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: My overall experience with Fingercheck was a positively great one. I use it daily and its nice to know that I can count on Fingercheck to get my daily task done.
author: Meghan A.
pros: If there is one thing that I like the most about Fingercheck is being able to have access to a mobile app that I can use anywhere.
cons: The one thing I like least about Fingercheck was the lag time while in the app, and that did not happen more than a few times. Overall I enjoy the Fingercheck.

description: The overall experience was awful. I wish I read all the bad reviews because then the exact same things happened to my company.
author: Nicole S.
pros: It was easy to sign up. They have their pricing online.
cons: Their website menus don't make sense and make it difficult for you to find anything. They will put a hold on your account for issues they cause, and this will cause you to not be able to pay your employees. They filed our taxes incorrectly so now we have to pay to refile. They are way too difficult to do business with.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great and easy to use. Amazing way to keep track of everything! Keep up the great work!!! Thank you!!
author: Kayla F.
pros: It's a great way to clock in and out and to do the payroll as well. It also helps us manage the times and clock ins..
cons: Honestly there is nothing that I don't like about it. I really enjoy using finger check and hope to continue using it going forward.

description: Fingercheck made payroll and HR tasks easy and efficient. Great tool for small business management, I love it
author: OUSSAMA Y.
pros: Reduce time and charges, make the business so easy to hundle and keep the work go softly without a lot of problems
cons: Price and simple to use The interface felt outdated at times, and customer support response could be slow during peak hours.

author: Victor L.
pros: I have ever liked the alert features incorporated in this tool that helps alot in monitoring your time and knowing the overtime work.
cons: The problem you will find with this tool is only the cost which is abit expensive and you will feel the pain

review_title: Fingercheck - a great, affordable time tracking tool
description: It automates tasks like time tracking, payroll processing, and employee management. Employees can clock in and out using mobile apps with GPS biometric scanners web into phases, while employees get tools to handle schedules and compliance.
author: Clifford H.
pros: Ease of use. Affordability. I've found it great for time checking. I used it when working with a freelance team in a previous organisation.
cons: Hard to say; I'm not sure if it has been updated lately, but I found it easy to use when I used it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall it was very great a few employees and myself went through it and it’s very great platform to use
author: Mike A.
pros: Very simple to use employees can clock in very easily and quickly same goes for breaks and finishing time
cons: I feel the employee tracking could be done a lot easier instead of going name by name just having a total of hours worked
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Nathaniel F.
pros: The layout was simple to use and understand.
cons: Some things were harder to find then they should have been.

description: amazing app helps you keep track of employees timesheets and payroll in a clear and easy fashion 5 stars! Could see my worked hours, over time, and much more.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Over all quality is good, features are very usable & easy to use. Team support response is very nice. I had a problem with the app and they launched a update fixing the problem the same day. Also really quick response by the customer service.
cons: Customer Support,neat & easy to work with great achievement for the business world. Data our fingertips is userfreindly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I has been a great experience using GingerCheck
author: Lisa M.
pros: I can track my hours from work and check my schedule.
cons: I like to verify to verify my schedule information.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mairlyn A.
pros: The fact is available for use from a desktop or a mobile device.
cons: It has some nice functions, such as accessing the work organization and seeing everyone's profile, but I believe the company I worked for when I used it wasn't interested in that because we never used it.

author: Sarah M.
pros: I have no complaints with this platform. I rarely use it, but when needed, it does the job well.
cons: Having to recall my username and password.

description: Pound for Pound, FingerCheck hasn't been anything short of what we needed but also turned out being more than we imagined.
author: Jeremy C.
pros: I really found myself moving through the software freely thanks to it's ease of use.
cons: It took a moment to get use to and get the hang of things, but once I did - it was natural.

description: accurate time keeping of a large number of employees made easy!
author: Scott S.
pros: Very easy to track employees times with the online user interface. Overall a very good time keeping program, highly recommend.
cons: Occasionally misses punches, when it would appear that the fingerprint was read correctly. Other than that very good program.

description: less paper work. can track break time log in and log out time easily. easy to find out how many hours staff worked.
author: Raz G.
pros: I can easily manage staff hours. Track break time, and punch in and out time without any issues. The mobile app makes it very simple to use

review_title: Great service, quick response and lots of great features.
author: Sury F.
pros: What I really love about fingercheck is that we can have the employees clock in on their system and so have all payroll info in one place for easy processing. This is great for a company with dozens of employees.
cons: What makes a bit hard is that payroll needs two business days to process and it can not be done after 4:30.

author: Jason G.
pros: Awesome way to log into the phone. Makes life simple and takes remembering a password much easier and safer
cons: The position is too high up on the device and logging into sites like banking there is no maximum amount of tries before being locked.

author: Michael L.
pros: You can see your pay stub early, i get to see my hours, i can edit my time sheets when needed. I love everything about this app

author: Shmuel B.
pros: Works Very nice it is easy to use, And when I need something I can always call them and get any info that I need they answer very Quick

description: FingerCheck has streamlined time tracking for employees saved our company time and money on each payroll. Training and support makes everything super easy
author: Chaim S.

review_title: Perfect and Ease to Use Tool for HR Functions
description: Overall my experience with Fingercheck has been exceptional I like that it ensures we are able to schedule employees without any conflicts. It helps us reduce the complexity of managing employees which has seen great productivity for us.
author: Vanessa C.
pros: Fingercheck has great time tracking features that helps us track employees tasks so we are able to ensure we schedule employees according to their skills and availability so there are mix ups. It has an intuitive interface that is very easy to use. Even new users without any technical skills do not struggle to get the best out of this tool.
cons: Fingercheck has been an exceptionally great tool for us. I have not experienced any challenges with this tool.

description: Finger check combines payroll processing, time tracking, scheduling, onboarding, and HR management in one platform, reducing the need for multiple tools. It is a good value for small to midsize businesses.
author: Marcus S.
pros: Onboarding is smooth and easy to use. payroll processing and employee time tracking are accurate and reliable, with automated tax calculations and built-in compliance handling.
cons: Customer service is very inconsistent. Its very slow and difficult when issues arise. The learning curve for advanced settings and configurations can require extra training or clearer documentation.

author: ANDREY V.
pros: Super easy to keep track of time for employees and for modifying time cards for those who forgot to clock in or out.
cons: I little pricer than other alternatives but well worth it for the rich feature set fingercheck provides.

description: I only need the bare minimum to run my company so the fingercheck app works great for me. If I ever need something more id change apps
author: Ashley O.
pros: The best thing about this app is that it's one of the most easiest to use for management and employees
cons: The number one con of this app is that it can be glitchy at times. If your looking for an app that does more then the basics then this one isn't for you.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
